_note: SYNTHETIC placeholder golden set — NOT human-verified. Replace with a human-curated sample (section-22) before trusting these accuracy numbers.
_schema: Each row: { id (pe_program_match.id), peCode, programName, correct }. `correct` is the analyst verdict: was an ACCEPTED match actually right? Precision is measured over the rows the system accepted (pe_program_match.status='accepted'). A real set is 25 accepted + 25 rejected decisions exported from the resolution console; see README.md.
